data.title: UK Manufacturing Sees Significant Growth
data.description: British companies have increased their production at the quickest rate in nearly two years. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this surge as a positive sign for the UK's economic recovery. The growth in output is attributed to rising demand and improved market conditions, which have encouraged businesses to ramp up their production efforts. This development marks a significant turnaround for the manufacturing sector, which has faced numerous challenges in recent times. Analysts suggest that this upward trend could continue if current conditions persist, providing a much-needed boost to the overall economy.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Indian Prime Minister Modi Discusses Inclusive AI with UN Secretary-General
data.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently met with United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres to discuss the role of artificial intelligence in fostering inclusivity. According to Jin10, the meeting focused on how the UN can contribute constructively to the development and implementation of AI technologies that benefit all sectors of society. The dialogue underscores the growing importance of AI in global discussions and the need for international cooperation to ensure its equitable advancement.

data.title: South Korean authorities under fire over $43B Bithumb Bitcoin error
data.description:
Lawmakers criticize South Korea’s Financial Services Commission after Bithumb mistakenly credited 620,000 BTC and the probe faces delays.

data.title: Minor International Considers Hong Kong Listing for Restaurant Unit
data.description: Minor International is contemplating a public listing of its restaurant division in Hong Kong to generate capital. Bloomberg posted on X, indicating that the company aims to leverage the financial markets to support its expansion plans. The move comes as Minor International seeks to enhance its financial flexibility and strengthen its position in the competitive restaurant industry. The potential listing is part of a broader strategy to optimize the company's portfolio and increase shareholder value. Details regarding the timeline and specific financial targets have not been disclosed. The decision reflects the company's ongoing efforts to adapt to changing market conditions and capitalize on growth opportunities.

data.title: India Extends Approval for Russian Insurers Covering Tankers at Ports
data.description: India has granted an extension for four Russian insurance companies to provide coverage for tankers docking at its ports. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this decision amid ongoing geopolitical tensions. The move allows these insurers to continue operations, ensuring that Russian tankers can access Indian ports without disruption. This development is crucial for maintaining the flow of goods and energy supplies between the two nations, as India remains a key importer of Russian oil. The extension reflects India's strategic approach to balancing its energy needs with international diplomatic considerations.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Ukraine Open to Compromise Without Sacrificing Sovereignty
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has expressed Ukraine's willingness to engage in genuine compromise, provided it does not come at the expense of the country's independence and sovereignty. According to Jin10, Zelensky emphasized that while Ukraine is open to discussing compromise solutions with the United States, it will not accept repeated ultimatums from Russia. This statement underscores Ukraine's firm stance on maintaining its national integrity amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Canton Strategic Holdings Updates Stock Code Following Name Change
data.description: Canton Strategic Holdings, a Nasdaq-listed company, has officially changed its name from Tharimmune and updated its stock code to 'CNTN.' According to PANews, this marks the first U.S. publicly traded company supported by the Canton Foundation. The company also announced the completion of a previously disclosed $55 million fundraising through stock registration issuance, aimed at expanding its digital asset fund management strategy centered around Canton Coin.

data.title: MYX Finance Surges Over 70% Following Strategic Funding Round
data.description: MYX Finance has seen a rapid increase in its token price, surging over 70% after announcing a strategic funding round led by Consensys. According to NS3.AI, this development signals strong investor confidence as the MYX V2 launch approaches. The token had previously entered oversold territory, suggesting a reduction in selling pressure and paving the way for the recent rebound. Despite the bullish sentiment, the price is encountering critical resistance levels, and there is a risk of a significant pullback if gains are not sustained.

data.title: Gold valued at $5,790 under Deutsche Bank reserve model
data.description:
Deutsche Bank outlines a $5,790 gold threshold: data shows how central bank gold reserves and a lower USD share of reserves drive model sensitivities.
source: https://coincu.com/news/gold-valued-at-5790-under-deutsche-bank-reserve-model/

data.title: Spot gold rises above $5,040 per ounce
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold rose above $5,040 per ounce, up 0.88% on the day. Spot silver broke through $81 per ounce, reaching a new high since February 12, up 3.23% on the day.

data.title: Federal Reserve's $1.85 Billion Repo Operation Sparks Interest
data.description: The Federal Reserve conducted a significant repo operation on February 17, injecting $1.85 billion into the market, marking the fourth-largest infusion since the pandemic began. According to Bitalk News, the amount sharply decreased over the following two days, with no signs indicating a shift in policy direction. Concurrently, Bitcoin ETFs have experienced outflows for five consecutive weeks, totaling approximately $4 billion, as demand remains under pressure.

data.title: Central Banks' Gold Accumulation Raises Questions Amid Uncertain Economic Conditions
data.description: Central banks worldwide are increasing their gold reserves, raising questions about when this trend might end. According to PANews, while the U.S. Federal Reserve aims to maintain stable interest rates, the Trump administration is advocating for rate cuts, contributing to global uncertainty in interest rates and inflation. The World Gold Council reports that central banks currently hold foreign exchange reserves totaling approximately $13 trillion, with official gold holdings amounting to 36,000 tons. At the current gold price of $5,500 per ounce, the value of these gold reserves is estimated at $6.37 trillion. Research from Deutsche Bank suggests that if gold prices reach $5,790 per ounce, central banks' gold reserves will surpass their dollar reserves, potentially making gold the primary global reserve asset.

data.title: Chancellor Merz Aims to Unite CDU Party with Vision for Germany
data.description: Chancellor Friedrich Merz is set to galvanize support within his Christian Democratic Union (CDU) party by presenting his strategic vision for Germany. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Merz's efforts to consolidate party backing as he outlines his plans for the nation's future. Merz's leadership approach focuses on addressing key economic challenges and fostering growth, aiming to strengthen Germany's position on the global stage. His initiative comes at a crucial time as the CDU seeks to solidify its influence and navigate the evolving political landscape. Merz's vision emphasizes economic stability and innovation, aiming to drive progress and ensure Germany's competitiveness in international markets. The Chancellor's strategy is expected to resonate with party members, as he seeks to unify the CDU under a cohesive and forward-looking agenda.

data.title: Deutsche Bank Partners with Ripple to Enhance Cross-Border Payments
data.description: Deutsche Bank has entered into a partnership with Ripple to enhance its cross-border payment and settlement infrastructure through blockchain technology. According to NS3.AI, despite the significance of this collaboration, the price of XRP has remained stable, trading around $1.40. Market analysts emphasize that the partnership does not directly affect XRP's price, as the token's value is more influenced by the overall dynamics of the cryptocurrency market rather than individual corporate partnerships.

data.title: Mirae Asset Acquires 92% Stake in South Korea’s Korbit Exchange
data.description:
Mirae Asset secures a 92% controlling stake in Korbit, signaling further integration of crypto with traditional finance in South Korea amid potential regulatory limits.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/mirae-asset-acquires-92-stake-in-south-koreas-korbit-exchange/

data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty increased by 15%, the largest increase since 2021.
data.description: Bitcoin mining difficulty surged 15% to 144.4T, the largest increase since 2021. Prior to this adjustment, mining difficulty had decreased by 12%. Currently, the Bitcoin network hashrate has recovered from a low of 826 EH/s to 1 ZH/s, while hashprice, a measure of miners' daily revenue per unit of hashrate, remains at a multi-year low of approximately $23.9/PH/s. In terms of price, Bitcoin fell from an all-time high of approximately $126,500 to $60,000, but has since rebounded to approximately $67,000. Furthermore, some listed mining companies are shifting resources towards AI. Bitfarms (BITF) recently announced a rebranding to increase its focus on AI infrastructure. Meanwhile, activist investor Starboard urged Riot Platforms (RIOT) to further expand its AI data center business.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 68,000 USDT with a 1.81% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 20, 2026, 09:03 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 68,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 68,162.078125 USDT, with a narrowed 1.81% increase in 24 hours.
